comments.author: @RajeshKamath-m5v
comments.text: God indeed protects these indians everyday, every minute. If these conditions had existed in the Western world, only God can say, what would have happened.

comments.author: @saurabhgupta5515
comments.text: You are almost wrong about your conclusions and choice of content. I am living here for more then 30 years and still don’t know all about India, please stop making such nonsense contents and try to understand the bigger picture which need bigger thought process.

replies.author: @GlobeDiscovery-NY
